title: absinthium boreale
intro: Absinthium boreale, also known as wormwood, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic effects. The health benefits of Absinthium boreale include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Absinthium boreale can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being added to capsules or used in topical applications.
